'''Meris III''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Meris system]].

A [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] world, Meris III's rich natural environment led to the development of many unique life forms; one plant was proven to be a particularly effective treatment for [[Taren plague]] and related viruses. There were several harvesting colonies on the planet, with pharmaceutical refinement [[Factory/Legends|factories]] on [[Merisee/Legends|Merisee]].

Meris III was orbited by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].
